message:
fix(release): pin asupersync in dist.yml; bump to v0.2.44

Upstream asupersync main is transiently carrying trait-breaking API
churn (new Reactor methods like register_buffer_pool / allocate_buffer
that the trait does not declare). That breaks every dist.yml job that
clones asupersync tip, which is why v0.2.43's dist run failed across
linux-x86_64 and linux-aarch64 with `method is not a member of trait
Reactor` errors.

Pin all three asupersync clones in dist.yml to db186126 — the last SHA
known-good for mcp_agent_mail_rust builds (the local mcp workspace is
currently linking cleanly against it). Drop `--depth 1` since shallow
clones can't check out arbitrary SHAs.

Bumping to v0.2.44 so the new tag re-triggers dist with the pin.
When upstream asupersync main compiles again, un-pin and the clones
go back to `--depth 1` of tip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,7 +17,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Clone sibling dependencies
         run: |
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch ../frankensearch
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync ../asupersync
+          # asupersync main is transiently broken (trait-breaking API churn upstream); pin to last SHA known-good for mcp_agent_mail_rust builds. Unpin when upstream main cleanly compiles.
+          git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync ../asupersync
+          git -C ../asupersync checkout --quiet db186126b40d9d3028be731ff1bfea47614e2b1b
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/sqlmodel_rust ../sqlmodel_rust
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
@@ -44,7 +46,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Clone sibling dependencies
         run: |
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch ../frankensearch
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync ../asupersync
+          # asupersync main is transiently broken (trait-breaking API churn upstream); pin to last SHA known-good for mcp_agent_mail_rust builds. Unpin when upstream main cleanly compiles.
+          git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync ../asupersync
+          git -C ../asupersync checkout --quiet db186126b40d9d3028be731ff1bfea47614e2b1b
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/sqlmodel_rust ../sqlmodel_rust
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
@@ -88,7 +92,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Clone sibling dependencies
         run: |
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch ../frankensearch
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync ../asupersync
+          # asupersync main is transiently broken (trait-breaking API churn upstream); pin to last SHA known-good for mcp_agent_mail_rust builds. Unpin when upstream main cleanly compiles.
+          git clone https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync ../asupersync
+          git -C ../asupersync checkout --quiet db186126b40d9d3028be731ff1bfea47614e2b1b
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/sqlmodel_rust ../sqlmodel_rust
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite ../frankensqlite
           git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui ../frankentui
